code:
import io
import string
import list

fn is_digit(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b >= 48 and b <= 57
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  mut line = 0
  mut threshold = 0
  mut have_num = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut neg = false

  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 10
        if have_num
          let v = if neg
            -cur
          else
            cur
          end
          if line == 0
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          else
            threshold = v
          end
          have_num = false
          cur = 0
          neg = false
        end
        if line == 0
          line = 1
        end
      else if b == 45 and not have_num
        neg = true
        have_num = true
        cur = 0
      else if is_digit(b)
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        have_num = true
      else
        if have_num
          let v = if neg
            -cur
          else
            cur
          end
          if line == 0
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          else
            threshold = v
          end
          have_num = false
          cur = 0
          neg = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  if have_num
    let v = if neg
      -cur
    else
      cur
    end
    if line == 0
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    else
      threshold = v
    end
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  mut j = 0
  let len = nums.len()
  while j < len
    match nums.get(j)
    when Some(x)
      if x > threshold
        if first
          out = "#{x}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{x}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
